motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveals: fade-up with 0.6s duration, 0.2s stagger for grid items

sections.name: Header
sections.layout: Sticky top, flex justify-between items-center. Left: Logo, Center: Nav links, Right: Language Switcher (FR/EN flags) + Download CTA.
sections.styles: Glassmorphism header specs, z-50, rounded-b-[20px]. Instant content change with no reload.

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: min-h-[90vh] relative overflow-hidden flex items-center justify-center
sections.content: Dark luxury city bg with parallax. Central foreground photo of diverse young professionals using a phone. 6 floating icons orbiting them.
sections.styles: bg-black/60 overlay on bg image. CONNECTER highlighted in text-[#F7A500].

sections.name: About Baked
sections.layout: Grid 2x2 for cards. White background section.
sections.styles: bg-[#FFFFFF] text-[#050505]. Cards have subtle shadow-lg, border border-gray-100, and rounded-[20px].

sections.name: Super App Ecosystem
sections.layout: Grid 1 col mobile, 2 cols tablet, 3 cols desktop. gap-8.
sections.content: 6 large white cards: EXPRESSbakēd, FOODbakēd, MARTbakēd, SHOPbakēd, AUTObakēd, IMMObakēd.
sections.styles: Cards are bg-[#FFFFFF]. 20px radius. Colored title, description, colored circular arrow button bottom-left. Illustration right.

sections.name: Why Baked
sections.layout: Flex or Grid split. 4 benefit cards, 3 large counters.
sections.styles: bg-[#111111] text-[#FFFFFF]. counters use count-up animation.

sections.name: Mobile App Showcase
sections.layout: Relative container, 5 smartphones rotated and floating at different depths.
sections.styles: bg-[#050505] futuristic dark scene. Each phone has a specific neon glow shadow matching the app colors. iOS/Android coming-soon buttons.

sections.name: Careers
sections.layout: Split layout. Left: Team Photo, Right: Content + CTA.
sections.styles: bg-[#FFFFFF] card on dark section or split bg. '+++' gold pattern on right. Gold outlined pill button for CTA.

sections.name: Contact
sections.layout: Split 50/50. Left: Form (Name, Email, Phone, Company, Message), Right: Map Placeholder + Contact Info.
sections.styles: bg-[#111111]. Inputs: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 focus:border-[#F7A500] text-white.

sections.name: Footer
sections.layout: 4 columns. Télécharger, Découvrir Baked, Réseaux Sociaux, Besoin d'aide. Giant centered BAKED logo at bottom.

images.description: Dark and moody cityscape image showcasing skyscrapers under a cloudy sky.
Two business professionals engaging in a serious conversation outside a building.
Multicultural group of professionals discussing ideas in a bright, modern office setting.

icons.usage: Use Phosphor icons (Duotone or Fill) for the 6 app cards as illustration alternatives. Van, Hamburger, Basket, ShoppingBag, Car, House. Colors must match the brand specific color for each app.

brand_identity.naming_convention: FIRSTWORD + bakēd (lowercase with macron ē). FIRSTWORD is uppercase and colored. bakēd is white (or dark on light backgrounds).

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the JSON data is correctly parsed for multi-language (i18n) setup. Implement an instant language switcher using React Context or similar, defaulting to FR, saving preference to localStorage.
Strictly follow the color mappings for the apps. Implement them using inline styles or extended Tailwind config variables.
For the hero floating icons, map over an array of the 6 apps and use Framer Motion for floating animations.
Ensure 'bakēd' always renders with the macron 'ē'.
Implement the 'Why Baked' counters using an intersection observer to count up when in view.
In the Mobile App Showcase, use CSS transforms (rotate, translateY) alongside Framer Motion to create a depth effect with the 5 phones. Wrap them in a perspective container.
Do not use generic placeholder text; use the exact copy provided or contextually appropriate copy in FR/EN.
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute.
Install and use Chivo and Manrope from next/font/google.
